allowed_advisories.reason: RSC Mode CSRF Bypass. STL Studio's frontend is a plain Vite SPA with client-side routing only — no React Server Components, no SSR, no framework mode — so this advisory's attack surface does not exist here. No forward-fixed release exists yet; downgrading to the last version below the vulnerable range (7.11.0) was tested and rejected — it reintroduces 14 more severe, applicable advisories (open-redirect XSS, stored XSS, an RCE via deserialization, CSRF, multiple DoS vectors) that the current version already fixes.
